note: Manifest-driven art overrides for the 4X map (src/ui/assets/registry.ts). Add files to items[] to override procedural sprites; absent/empty items = pure procedural. Default file for a slot is <slot>.png. Generated by scripts/hf-assets.ts (catalog: src/data/assetCatalog.ts) or dropped in by hand. Generated PNGs are gitignored; the committed manifest stays empty (procedural default).
